title: Stage exact Release 1217 base and four-path room-density delta
description: Create fail-closed Release 1218 staging above exact qualified Release 1217 with a reviewed four-path production change set.
close_reason: The stager validates exact Release 1217 manifest and artifact SHA, changes only 1dungeon.zil, assistance.zil, room_density.zil, and zork1.zil, emits a receipt, and rejects all drift.

title: Make Troll Room and Gallery prose nouns targetable
description: Add bounded room-scoped parser behavior for the Troll Room bloodstains, scratches, passages, hole, and Gallery paintings, frames, and departed vandals.
close_reason: Explicit room PSEUDOs now support physically reasonable canonical actions while preserving the troll, axe, valuable painting, map, combat, and treasure state.

title: Deepen Studio and East of Chasm scenery
description: Make the Studio floor, fireplace, hearth, sixty-nine paint colors, East of Chasm path, and northern passage respond without adding objects or routes.
close_reason: The advertised surfaces now respond to bounded examination, search, smell, touch, sound, and movement intent; canonical chimney, chasm, and north-exit behavior remains authoritative.

title: Deepen Strange Passage, Treasure Room, and path scenery
description: Add bounded responses for the ruined door/opening, crumbling bags/debris/floor, and forest/streamside paths.
close_reason: The explicitly named scenery is targetable and nonportable while the living-room exit, thief, chalice, treasure behavior, stairway, forest map, and stream remain canonical.

title: Preserve canonical travel and parser boundaries
description: Delegate established opening entry to existing exits and prove Release 1218 adds no free-form parser, universal scenery, hidden routes, or portable pseudo objects.
close_reason: West, north, and east traversal uses existing DO-WALK exits; vocabulary is room-scoped and limited to existing canonical actions.

title: Qualify Release 1218 gameplay and persistence
description: Pin the production artifact, run the deterministic room tour, corrupt discovery state, and prove native SAVE/RESTORE returns all categories.

title: Resolve review and document Release 1218
description: Address valid review and publish exact identity, room scope, parser boundary, validation, and next-frontier truth.

title: Publish Release 1218 capstone
description: Close the train only after exact-head qualification, inherited workflows, bead validation, review resolution, and truthful PR evidence pass.
